title: 2級 模擬テスト10 リスニング第1部 (Kyoto) 1
prompt: 対話を聞いて、最後の発言に最も合う応答を一つ選んでください。
audioText:
A: Have you had the chance to visit the space exploration in Kyoto, Grace?
B: Yes, although there were many people there.
A: I see. Would you recommend it to others?
explanation: grade2-10-listening1-01: リスニング第1部の問題です。文脈と設問条件に最も合う選択肢を選びます。

title: 2級 模擬テスト10 読解 1
prompt: 対話を聞いて、最後の発言に最も合う応答を一つ選んでください。
passage: Recently, space exploration has become very popular in Seattle. Since 2006, many residents gather on weekends. Nancy, the mayor, said that this activity helps build a strong community. In the future, the city plans to organize 17 more events related to space exploration.
explanation: grade2-10-reading-01: 読解の問題です。文脈と設問条件に最も合う選択肢を選びます。

title: 2級 模擬テスト10 読解 2
prompt: 会話を聞き、最後の発言への適切な応答を選択してください。
passage: Recently, historical monuments has become very popular in Berlin. Since 2007, many residents gather on weekends. Grace, the mayor, said that this activity helps build a strong community. In the future, the city plans to organize 24 more events related to historical monuments.
explanation: grade2-10-reading-02: 読解の問題です。文脈と設問条件に最も合う選択肢を選びます。

title: 2級 模擬テスト10 読解 3
prompt: 対話を聞き、その最後の発言に対する応答として最も適切なものを一つ選びなさい。
passage: Recently, wildlife conservation has become very popular in Boston. Since 2008, many residents gather on weekends. Tom, the mayor, said that this activity helps build a strong community. In the future, the city plans to organize 31 more events related to wildlife conservation.
choices: Because no one joined the events.
explanation: grade2-10-reading-03: 読解の問題です。文脈と設問条件に最も合う選択肢を選びます。

title: 2級 模擬テスト10 長文空所補充 1
prompt:
次の英文の（　　　）に入れるのに最も適切なものを1, 2, 3, 4の中から一つ選びなさい。
[Mock 10-1]
passage: In 2006, I participated in a space exploration in Seattle. It was a great experience. I met about 17 people who were interested in the same things. However, there was one (      ). We didn't have enough time to discuss everything.

choices: 文法やスペルミスが多数ある解答
explanation: grade2-10-writing_essay-01: 英作文の問題です。文脈と設問条件に最も合う選択肢を選びます。

title: 2級 模擬テスト10 英文要約 1
prompt:
次の条件に従って、解答しなさい。（※模擬テストシステム上、最も適切な選択肢を選んでください）

次の英文の要約として最も適切なものを選びなさい。
[Mock 10-1]
passage: Some people in Seattle believe that space exploration should be a priority. They argue that it provides long-term benefits for 17 residents. On the other hand, Rachel thinks that it costs too much money. Ultimately, finding a balance is crucial.
choices: 単語数が不足している不十分な解答
explanation: grade2-10-writing_summary-01: 英文要約の問題です。文脈と設問条件に最も合う選択肢を選びます。
